raw_text: The worst customer service you can receive was provided by Blinkit. I had ordered a BBlunt hair colour, however the packaging came completely torn and damaged in the back side. 2 of the major products were missing inside the packet, only 2 were there. THEN, BBlunt packet had a GARNIER user guideline slip. How in the world can these two brands mix up? This suggests that the packet was opened and the service team completely ignored it. Did not care to return the money or address the issue. WORST.
I really like this app. It's available in my village, offers Cash on Delivery, and delivers in just 20 minutes. The products are reasonably priced, and there are lots of items available !!! 👍🏻😄✨

Decent platform, however return process has to be smooth if any item is near expiry or you don't like the quality because most of the items are food items. Alternatively you always have a nearby grocery shop where you can actually check quality and buy so in long run only quality and fresh food stuff will help

I placed an order, but after confirming it, I received a call saying delivery is not available in my location. This is very disappointing and confusing. If delivery is not possible, the app should not allow the order to be placed in the first place. Please improve the location check system and avoid wasting customers’ time.

Every time I order bread, I regret it. They always crush the bread by packaging it under the items. Otherwise they are fine. Adding to this review after many months : bread delivery is still the worst.

It’s very difficult to return products. In my case, the delivery person never came for the pickup. The product was damaged, and when I contacted support, they only explained the process and asked me to do it myself. In the end, the issue was never resolved and the product is still lying with me.

No quality control check before the product leaves from outlet as the milk packets were torn and spilled all over and took the photos at the time of delivery Which was cleaned. And later when i try to raise a complaint through help desk its asking to take fresh pics.. Wow what a shame. No option of uploading the pics from gallery.

I have a big issue with the app. Recently I ordered a product by mistake but I wanted to cancel it as soon after the order but I faced difficulties while cancelling. The product arrived and I complained about this to the delivery agent. He helped me and it took almost half an hour to cancel. It's a sincere request to the developer to simply add a cancel order option in the app so that a person can cancel the order within 5 minutes of placing an order only

This app is making fake promises of delivery time, it's taking too much time for delivery items. First thing delivery time is very late , if you want to cancel order then taking also some amount, means it taking money on both side if you getting items or not.🤮

Wrong product delivered. Blinkit arranged a return pickup and the item was collected. Later, support denied my refund saying they couldn't identify the issue. No explanation, no accountability, and no proper investigation. Extremely disappointing experience.

worst customer care ever seen, whatever your issue is they only ask you to mail your issue, then what's the use of help chat in app. Even the returnable items can't be returned as they don't even reply to mails. On top of it no helpline number...

What a terrible app—they rip people off. They cancel orders for no reason and then fail to issue refunds. They’ve cancelled three of my orders in the last month, and I still haven't received my ₹2,400 back. That is not a small amount of money. If I don't get a refund, I will take legal action.

while ordering my product the after selecting the product in my cart and after ordering from cart the given all payment methods has been shown this payment methods are not available, even after adding money i. blinkit wallet the payment method is not available at the moment, now my money is stuck in wallet and there is no support from service centre pls resolve the problem

Half of the time the store is closed. The delivery time always increase after placing the order also with every delivery some of the items are either rotten or expired. After which you have to raise a complain and they will just say take a refund. How this is justified you have delivered expired product or fruits that had fungus on the surface and now you are saying customer take back the money. if this would have happen 1-2 time I can understand but with every delivery it's the same case.

Today on the 10th of May morning we ordered multiple orders on blinkit, eg milk, chicken, ginger & other stuff. After an hour we warm the milk & it smells weird and also becomes thicker, when we raise the images they refuse the resolution. Blinkit always has their storage issue without correct temperature How can they serve food when it comes to dairy products the temperature has to be perfect. really disappointed with service & quality.

this app gives best offers ☺️ . But the one thing is that this app charges rs 12 as handling charge although the other apps charge rs 0 or rs 1 or 2 . and it also don't give offers for old users it gives offers only for new users 😕 just one thing is that you are a new user so you can use this app this ordering grocery everything app it is best in this best offers best discounts and sometimes free things with your big Cart 🛒

It is available in more areas compared to its competitors but in locations where other delivery apps like zepto and Instamart are available I will never use Blinkit because of Very High Prices and ₹8 fee on all orders and also surge fee. Blinkit is stuck in 2022. However it is available in more areas which is good.

The Best App !! Best Service and alot of varieties -edit : previously it used to show 11-12 mins and it took almost 9 mins to deliver to my location but now it shows 19 mins irrespective of the time of the day and it takes almost 24-26 mins, really disappointed.Also 100% of the animal products like milk or egg are always rotten

too many times after completing the payment they are cheating me without sending my ordered products and also for that if I go through customer support team there is no option to talk or about our issue,the only thing that they mentioned is go back to main menu and issue with placing an order.They are cheating all of us by doing online marketing.we are all encouraging them to do like this by repeating orders ignoring their mistakes
worst experience. They deliver expired products. Doesn't offer refund instead had to add money as a coupon that can only be used on the same platform.
